title: JoinMe
subtitle: Meet people nearby, for real

footer.downloadText: Download the app and see who is nearby.

q1.title: What is JoinMe?
q1.answer: JoinMe is a social app for spontaneous, real-life activities with people nearby. No big events, no complicated planning - just small meetups that happen naturally.

q2.title: What is spontaneous mode?
q2.answer: Spontaneous Mode shows people nearby who are free right now and ready to do something. Share what you feel like doing, see who's around, chat briefly, and meet in real life.

q3.title: What is planned mode?
q3.answer: Planned Mode lets you create a small activity for the next few days. People nearby can discover it, join, and meet up when the time comes.

q4.title: Are matches guaranteed in a short time?
q4.answer: No. JoinMe is about real people and real moments, so matches are never guaranteed. When it clicks, great. When it doesn't, it can still be a genuine experience.

q5.title: Can I use spontaneous mode everywhere and anytime?
q5.answer: Technically yes. But since we are still small, it may not be useful everywhere yet. For now, we publish weekly meetup time-windows in specific Berlin areas, and update them in the app. As we grow, we will extend these windows. If we reach a very large user base, spontaneous mode may run all the time and everywhere.

q6.title: Do I have to pay to use JoinMe?
q6.answer: No. We just started, so JoinMe is free right now. We currently use ads and may add paid features later.

q7.title: Do other users always see my location?
q7.answer: No. Your location is only shared when you turn on spontaneous mode. In this mode, your approximate location is visible so others nearby can find you. Please use spontaneous mode only in public places, and don’t forget to turn it off when you’re done meeting or leave the public area.

homeLite.lead: Find people nearby who are up for real-life plans - no big events, no endless chatting.
homeLite.note: Small plans. Fresh faces. Real moments.
homeLite.spontaneousText: Open the app and see who's nearby for coffee, basketball, a walk, studying, or whatever feels right now.
homeLite.plannedText: Create a simple activity for later and let nearby people join. From tomorrow's coffee to a weekend walk.
homeLite.stepsText: Create or join an activity, chat briefly, then meet in real life.

index.heroP1: In a world full of feeds and messages, real-life connection matters more than ever.
index.heroP2: turns your phone into a simple way to meet people nearby and do something together.
index.heroP3b: , it starts with a small idea: create an activity or join one nearby. Download the app and see what's happening around you.
index.heading: How JoinMe Works
index.description: JoinMe helps you meet people nearby through small, authentic activities. Join something spontaneous, create a simple plan, chat only as much as needed, and turn online interest into a real-life moment.

why.title: Why JoinMe?
why.text: JoinMe helps people meet in real life through spontaneous or lightly planned activities. Not every meetup has to become a perfect match. Sometimes it is simply about trying something new, seeing the city differently, and sharing a real moment.
why.text1: Tired of scrolling, matching, and chatting without ever meeting? JoinMe is built for people who want to step outside and do something real.
why.text2: Find small activities nearby, join people who are open to meeting, or create your own plan in seconds. No big organizers, no pressure, no complicated event setup.
why.benefit1: Meet people nearby through shared interests
why.benefit2: Create or join small activities - spontaneous or planned
why.benefit3: Keep chat short and make the meetup real
why.benefit4: Discover your city through other people
why.activitiesTitle: What Can You Do with JoinMe?
why.activitiesSubtitle: Start with whatever you feel like doing. A walk, a coffee, a workout, a study session, a night out, or a niche hobby - JoinMe is made for small real-life activities that feel natural, safe, and easy to join.
why.activity1: 🌿 Take a walk in the park with someone new
why.activity2: 🧗‍♀️ Try a local climbing gym together
why.activity3: 🎨 Go on a street-art or sketch walk
why.activity4: 📚 Meet for coffee and a relaxed book chat
why.activity6: 🚴‍♂️ Explore the city on a casual bike ride
why.activity7: 🎤 Find people nearby for karaoke night
why.end: Create something simple, join something nearby, and see where the moment takes you.

feature1Text: Some of the best moments happen without a plan. Turn on Spontaneous Mode to see people nearby who are free right now - for coffee, sports, a walk, studying, partying, or anything simple and real.
feature2Text: Have an idea for later? Create a small activity and let others nearby join. Keep it casual, choose the time and place, and make your week feel more alive.
feature3Text: Stay in control of how you meet. See the activity details, decide who joins your plans, and use chat to coordinate without getting stuck in endless messages. Real-life connection stays the focus.

safety.title: Safety Standards
safety.intro: JoinMe helps people connect, but each user is responsible for their own decisions and safety during meetups.

section1.title: 1. User Responsibility
section1.text: Every user is responsible for their own behavior, choices, and personal safety when using the app or meeting others.

section2.title: 2. Reporting
section2.text: Users can report content or other users in the app, or report abuse by email. Reports are acknowledged automatically.

section3.title: 3. Manual Review
section3.text: Reports are reviewed manually by the app operator. Based on that review, content or accounts may be removed.

section4.title: 4. Safety Tips
section4.text: JoinMe provides tools and guidance, but users remain responsible for their own safety.

section5.title: 5. Contact Information
section5.text: To report abuse in the app or by email, contact us at
section5.note: JoinMe provides tools and guidance, but users remain responsible for their own safety.

tips.tip1: Meet in public places like cafés or parks.
tips.tip2: Let a friend or family member know your plans.
tips.tip4: Use your own transport or public traffic.
tips.tip5: Trust your instincts - leave if something feels off.
tips.tip6: You can always report another user in the app.
